Tables 1 and lll can enable us to rectify the time of birth.
Where necessary we need modification from Table N (A) and
(C), and also from Table V.
From these tables we can draw some conclusions.
(1) The tables stop at Vighatis only. But what happens when
the recorded births give us something like gh 9. Vgh 40
and 45 (3/4 Vgh)? This is a serious snag in this theory.
(2) The tables show that births can occur at sunrise and sun
set.
(3) These tables can help to fix the time of birth within three
to five minutes alone.
(4) They do not determine the sex of the native. Possibly we
have to amend the principle given in Uttara Kalamrita
